{"code":"
(def prs (github_pull_requests))
(def open-by-repo (->> prs (filter #(= (:state %) "open")) (group-by :repository)))
(def merged-by-repo (->> prs (filter #(= (:state %) "merged")) (group-by :repository)))
(def all-repos (distinct (map :repository prs)))
(def report

               merged-prs (get merge…(+402)

message: get: cannot use nil as a map key — use a keyword (:name), string, or number
